failure_stage: first reused case, first fixed-Huber reduced reoptimization
exception_message: Cannot convert a MPS Tensor to float64 dtype as the MPS framework does not support float64
diagnosed_root_cause: The v2 repair covered the reduced least-squares solve but not all CPU-float64 workspace entries in the Huber reoptimizer. A v3 repair must centralize every cross-device conversion and add an end-to-end MPS reoptimizer regression test.
